value.found_quote: A dev container is a convenient place to apply organization policy, because the same image and configuration run on every engineer's machine. ... Claude Code reads `/etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json` on Linux and applies it at the highest precedence in the [settings hierarchy](/en/settings#how-scopes-interact) ... To set [environment variables](/en/env-vars) that apply to every Claude Code session in the container, add them to `containerEnv` in your `devcontainer.json`.
value.rationale: The page has an "Enforce organization policy" section describing the use of managed-settings.json and environment variables (via containerEnv) to enforce policy across the team, directly substantiating the claim. Presented as a current capability.
